← All worlds/World 13
World 13 · 2 states

Obsession

Films for the dark passenger — the love, the work, the idea that colonised you. The films here understand that obsession is just desire with nowhere to go.

Choose an emotion
Destructive LoveCreative Obsession
On Destructive Love

There is a kind of love that you know, from the first moment, is going to cost you. You see the damage it will do — to you, to them, to the ordinary life you were building — and you walk toward it anyway. You cannot explain this to anyone who has not felt it. You cannot explain it to yourself. These films do not judge that. They sit inside the heat of the decision and let it breathe. They do not pretend love is always wise. They understand that some of the most real things you will ever feel are exactly the ones that had no future.

Destructive Love

Films for the love that knew it was wrong and kept going.

Brokeback Mountain

🏆 Won 3 Academy Awards incl. Best Director

CS9.6
1958

Vertigo

Alfred Hitchcock

View Film →

A retired detective with a fear of heights becomes dangerously fixated on a mysterious woman he has been hired to follow — and on the version of her he has invented in his mind.

CS9.5
2000

In the Mood for Love

Wong Kar-wai

View Film →

Two neighbours in 1962 Hong Kong discover their spouses are having an affair, and in the slow, aching process of that discovery, fall into a love they will never act on.

CS8.8
2013

Blue Is the Warmest Colour

Abdellatif Kechiche

View Film →

A French teenager falls all-consumingly in love with a blue-haired art student, and the film follows their relationship from electric beginning through devastating end.

CS8.9
1981

Possession

Andrzej Żuławski

View Film →

A spy returns home to find his wife wants a divorce, and as he tries to understand why, reality itself begins to dissolve into horror and obsession.

CS8.4
2002

Secretary

Steven Shainberg

View Film →

A fragile young woman begins working as a secretary and enters a complex, transformative relationship with her controlling employer.

CS8.7
1962

Lolita

Stanley Kubrick

View Film →

A middle-aged professor becomes obsessively fixated on his landlady's teenage daughter, and the darkly comic tragedy of that fixation unfolds across America.

CS8.9
1999

Eyes Wide Shut

Stanley Kubrick

View Film →

A doctor's marriage is shaken by his wife's confession of a fantasy, sending him on a nocturnal odyssey through New York's hidden erotic world.

CS8.6
2014

Foxcatcher

Bennett Miller

View Film →

A wealthy, eccentric heir draws two wrestling brothers into his orbit and a relationship of patronage and obsession with devastating consequences.

CS9.1
1957

Nights of Cabiria

Federico Fellini

View Film →

A resilient, irrepressible Roman prostitute searches for love, encountering false promises and betrayal while somehow maintaining her extraordinary spirit.

CS9.3
2005

Brokeback Mountain

Ang Lee

View Film →

Two cowboys spend a summer together on a Wyoming mountain and fall into a love neither can fully accept — carrying it across decades and separate lives.
